notes: filled in later - array of tags

review status - review status - tbd,reject,bad,dup,ok,good,best. Reject will have a level of 0, bad a level of 1, dup a level of 2, ok a level of 3, good a level of 4. and best a level of 5. tbd can have a level of 0 - 4, but never 5, since at 5 the status must be best.
review level - incremented for each review cycle
notes about image, such as any special reason it's being kept
optional 1-9.999 rating as generated by MUSIQ with AVA model
optional - name of photo which this photo is a duplicate of
'T' if this photo is the target of another photos dup_photo value
cosine similarity to dup keeper when duplicate; -1 when not; blank if unknown
optional blog intro paragraph for image
optional blog album uri for image
optional extended blog description for image
